# netbox_device_primary_ip (Resource)

Manages the primary IPv4/IPv6 addresses of a Device in Netbox.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "netbox_device_primary_ip" "example" {
  device_id       = netbox_device.example.id
  primary_ipv4_id = netbox_ip_address.example_v4.id
  primary_ipv6_id = netbox_ip_address.example_v6.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `device_id` (Number) The ID of the device to configure.

### Optional

- `primary_ipv4_id` (Number) The ID of the IP address to set as the primary IPv4 address.
- `primary_ipv6_id` (Number) The ID of the IP address to set as the primary IPv6 address.

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The numeric ID of the device (same as device_id).
